articles.title: SEC TO HALT REQUIRING CRYPTO FIRMS TO REGISTER AS TRADING SYSTEMS
articles.summary: The SEC will no longer require crypto firms to register as trading systems, signaling a shift toward a more lenient regulatory stance under Acting Chair Mark Uyeda. This move follows the agency's recent trend of pausing lawsuits against major crypto firms and aligns with the pro-crypto policies of the new administration.

articles.title: TRUMP PLANS TO SIGN EXECUTIVE ORDER ENDING BIDEN-ERA CRYPTO DEBANKING
articles.summary: President Donald Trump plans to sign an executive order reversing Biden-era policies that restricted crypto companies' access to banking services, aiming to roll back “Operation Chokepoint 2.0.” The order may also influence Federal Reserve policies and redefine stablecoins, marking Trump's third crypto-focused executive action since returning to office.

articles.title: COINBASE UNVEILS 24/7 BITCOIN & ETHEREUM FUTURES TRADING IN THE US
articles.summary: Coinbase is launching 24/7 Bitcoin and Ethereum perpetual futures trading in the US, allowing traders to manage risk and seize opportunities without time restrictions. The move, part of Coinbase's expansion strategy, follows the SEC dropping its lawsuit against the platform and aligns with the growing pro-crypto shift in the country.

articles.title: COMPOUND-MORPHO PROPOSAL SPARKS DEBATE
articles.summary: A proposal to launch Compound-Morpho lending vaults on Polygon, backed by $3M in incentives, has sparked controversy. While it promises TVL growth and tech upgrades, critics argue Gauntlet's dual role as Curator and Allocator creates a conflict of interest, with concerns over future fee structures and potential centralization of power. The debate highlights ongoing DAO governance challenges.

articles.title: REACH MILLIONS OF TECH PROFESSIONALS READING TLDR
articles.summary: Grab the attention of software developers, crypto enthusiasts, executives and other tech professionals reading TLDR every day. TLDR offers 10 interest-based newsletters to help you reach your target audience. Learn more [8] about running your first campaign with us.

articles.title: WHY YOU SHOULDN'T BUY THE DIP
articles.summary: Buying the dip isn't always a good idea, especially in speculative markets like memecoins and NFTs, where price drops don't necessarily mean an asset is undervalued. Market bubbles deflate slowly, narratives drive prices, and emotional trading can lead to losses—while BTC remains bullish long-term, patience might offer better opportunities.

articles.title: IS IT A SONIC BOOM?
articles.summary: Sonic, the next iteration of the Fantom blockchain, is a significant upgrade capable of 10,000 TPS and one-second finality through database, virtual machine, and consensus optimizations. It has quickly attracted $1 billion in TVL with numerous strong yield strategies. With DeFi pioneer Andre Cronje as CTO, Sonic aims to surpass existing chains by emphasizing capital efficiency, composability, and seamless integrations across protocols and exchanges.

articles.title: BEST BTC YIELDS IN DEFI
articles.summary: BTC has historically been an asset without many yield opportunities. However, the rise of BTCfi and points programs has unlocked ~5% APY on crypto's largest asset. Solv Protocol has numerous options for BTC-neutral strategies combining borrowing a yield-bearing asset with BTC longs. Berachain BTC deposits on Pendle Finance are paying a fixed 10%, with Lombard Finance LBTC positions paying slightly less.

articles.title: CONFESSIONS OF A CRYPTO MARKETER
articles.summary: Traditional marketing strategies like SEO and paid ads largely fail in crypto due to unique challenges like rapid market shifts, short user attention spans, and strict advertising regulations. Effective crypto marketing instead revolves around real-time community engagement, continuous education, transparency, and an integrated approach encompassing community management, product development, and customer support. Crypto marketing is less about conventional techniques and more about immersive community building, continuous education, authenticity, and responsiveness to user needs.

articles.title: BITCOIN VOLATILITY CRUISING AT HIGHEST LEVELS ALL YEAR DESPITE TRUMP'S RESERVE PLANS
articles.summary: Bitcoin's annualized volatility has hit a yearly high of about 59% even as President Trump signed an executive order for a strategic crypto reserve and held a summit with digital asset leaders.

articles.title: BBVA GETS REGULATORY NOD TO OFFER BITCOIN AND ETHER TRADING IN SPAIN
articles.summary: Spain's second-largest bank, BBVA, has secured regulatory approval from Spain's securities regulator (CNMV) to offer BTC and ETH trading using its mobile app.

articles.title: REASONS TO JOIN FARCASTER
articles.summary: Farcaster has a permissionless development environment, a supportive community, and a lean, efficient engineering team that can quickly execute on new features like Frames v2 and mini apps.

articles.title: UTAH SCRAPS BITCOIN RESERVE PROVISION BEFORE ADVANCING STATE'S CRYPTO BILL
articles.summary: The Utah Senate passed "HB230" to incorporate crypto into the state's legal framework, but removed a provision that would have allowed Utah to hold a Bitcoin reserve.

articles.title: EL SALVADOR CONTINUES ACCUMULATING BITCOIN AND NOW HOLDS 6,111 BTC DESPITE IMF PRESSURE
articles.summary: Despite agreeing to scale back public bitcoin activities under an IMF deal, El Salvador continued to buy bitcoin, raising its holdings to 6,111 BTC.
